festival_logic: Festival of Advancement anchors the midyear.
labor_bindings: Labor shifts and communal contribution are synchronized through long civic cycles.
Production quotas and regional achievement presentations structure planning.
ritual_bindings: Ambition and achievement festivals reinforce governance.
travel_bindings: Terraforming, rail, and caravan schedules follow long-cycle planning.
Axial flips and 73-day realignments affect seasonal transitions.
legal_bindings: Regional reporting and contribution review align with cycle checkpoints.
